name: Hildur Guðnadóttir
bio: Academy Award-winning composer known for Joker and Chernobyl.

name: Arvo Pärt
bio: Creator of the tintinnabuli style, one of the most performed living composers.

name: Alberto Iglesias
bio: Renowned for his collaborations with Pedro Almodóvar and multiple Goya awards.

name: Kaija Saariaho
bio: Prominent composer known for her spectral music and operas like L'Amour de loin.

name: Max Richter
bio: Influential figure in contemporary classical and minimalist music.

name: Raquel García-Tomás
bio: National Music Award winner, known for her interdisciplinary approach.

name: Philip Glass
bio: Pioneer of minimalism and one of the most influential composers of the 20th century.

name: Sofia Gubaidulina
bio: Deeply spiritual composer known for her unconventional instrumentation.

name: Bernat Vivancos
bio: Specialized in choral music and orchestral textures, former director of Escolania de Montserrat.

name: Caroline Shaw
bio: The youngest recipient of the Pulitzer Prize for Music for Partita for 8 Voices.
